description: Letters of thanks, drafts, mostly in rhymed prose, to Khalaf b. Yiṣḥaq and his cousin Yosef b. Avraham, Aden, for their gifts and loyalty to the Palestinian Academy (Yeshiva), then located in Cairo, Egypt. The letters are issued in the name of the Gaon. VMR
description_he: מכתבי תודה בפרוזה מחורזת מהישיבה לח'לף בן יצחק ויוסף בן אברהם בעדן על תרומות
